events.message: Liability cap at $5M with a $3M Section 9 sub-cap is within tolerance.
Net 60 over Net 30 hits Q1 cash flow. Tradeable for cap retention.
Initech precedent shows ~73% acceptance of Net 60 when a sub-cap holds.
OSFI third-party themes covered; PIPEDA accountability OK at 24h breach notice.
Following Counsel + Compliance: ACCEPT Move A. Closer agreed; Counterpart predicts likely accept.
Pushing back on every enterprise ask leaves Section 9 exposed if Initech caves on cap only.
If it lands we keep $420K in NPV — but the clock kills us before GC review wraps.
Initech walks at this stance — comparable PaymentsAPI 2023 deal died here.
Compliance posture unchanged regardless of branch.
Following Closer + Counterpart: REJECT Move B. Counsel abstained on existential risk.
Accepting uncapped Section 9 liability is an existential exposure for Dunder.
It closes — but it's not a deal we can ship through the board.
Initech accepts within 24h. They wanted exactly this.
OSFI/PIPEDA flags resolved — but vendor balance-sheet exposure not modelled here.
Following Counsel + Closer: REJECT Move C. Counterpart's accept does not change risk.
